sourceMovie.title: The Medallion
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Medallion works as a thriller movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The thriller and fantasy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Medallion clicked for you, Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness (2022) is a strong next stop: both trade in fantasy and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Medallion?
faq.answer: Try Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness, The Old Guard, Bloodsport—each shares DNA with The Medallion while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Medallion?
faq.answer: The Medallion (2003) is best described as Thriller, Fantasy, Action, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Medallion worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this thriller lane.
